name: Simple interest final amount
task: Create /tmp/eval_si/si.py with simple_interest(principal, rate, years) returning the final amount under simple interest: P * (1 + r * t). rate is a decimal (0.05 = 5%).

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_si/si.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); S = mod.simple_interest; assert abs(S(1000, 0.05, 10) - 1500) < 1e-9; assert abs(S(1000, 0, 10) - 1000) < 1e-9; assert abs(S(500, 0.04, 5) - 600) < 1e-9; print('OK')
